titleStmt.title: SII 27.201: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 201. (A.R. No. 267 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab standing on a hillock to the south of the tank opposite the temple of Gaṇapati at Chauḷikēri.

This is dated Śaka 1499 (current), Īśvara, Mārgaśira ba. 30, sōmōparāga. The tithi corresponds to 1577 A.D., December 9, the weekday being Monday. Reference to the lunar eclipse is obviously wrong. The engraver appears to have engraved ‘Sōmōparāga’ instead of Śōmavāra, i.e. Monday.

It registers a gift of land for worship, maintaining a feeding house, etc., in the maṭha constructed in the temple of Vighnēśvara of Chauḷiyakēri, by Muddaheggaḍe Aṇṇama-seṭṭi when Saṅkaṇa-nāyaka and Rāmarāja-nāyaka, sons of Sadāśivarāya-nāyaka of Keḷadi were governing Gutti, Araga and Bārakūru-rājyas and at their instance Achchappa-voḍeya of Kanaūru was administering Bārakūru-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ . śchuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
śrī vijayādbhudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1499 saṁdu Ayinūraneya vartamāna yośvara saṁvatsarada mārgaśira ba 30 sōmōparāgaObviously wrong for sōmavāra.
puṁṇyakāladalu . śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīra sadāśivarāya mahārāyaru sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ du
ṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipālaneyāgi sakalavaṁrnna dharṁmāśramaṁgalanū pratipālisuva kāladalū . Avara nirūpadiṁda keḷadiya sadāśivarāya nāya
karamakkaḷu saṁkaṇanāyakaru rāmarājanāyakaru guttiaraga bārakuru maṁgaluru rājyava Āḷuvakāladalu Avara nirūpadiṁda karaūra A
ccappoḍēyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuvalli cāḷeya kēriya vighnēśvara dēvara saṁnidhiyalū . jorasadabaḷiya Attottiruma seṭṭi Aḷiya mudda hegga
ḍe Aṇiseṭṭiyu biṭa dharma maṭhada catusīmeya vivara mūḍalū siṁhaṁṇagaḷa muṭṭida gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu kellaṁ
gereyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu . paḍuvalu . naḍavarāja bīdiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu jōgi maṭṭadagaḍi nīruhariva tēgadakaṇi yiṁdaṁ teṁkalu .
yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷagekaṭṭisida maṭhada . catrakeyirisida dēvapūjege biṭṭabāḷu catussīmeya vivara . haṁdaṭṭina paḍukuṭi huṭṭina bāḷa
gaḍi . U diṁpaḍuvalu . kēśahaṁde visthēhaṁde gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu . samudradiṁ mūḍalu . mādhavahaṁde gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu .
yī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage mu 2 gaddegēṇi Akkimu 1 dakketeṟu kaḷabittuva mu 12 guṁḍumeyalli huṭṭina bāḷu saṁkara kāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁ
paḍuvalū saṁkara kāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu bīmakāraṁtana maneṭhālu hagaḷiyiṁda mūḍalu . nāuḍi . kālaṇa gaḍiyiṁ mane
duraparisaha teṁkalu �yo gaḍiyiṁdoḷage mu 2[¢] gadege gēṇi Akiteṟu mu 16 tōṭa beṭṭu namma
gaḍi . ṁnnaṇa kāraṁtana gaḍipaḍuvalu . nāraṇa hāḷaragaḍiṁ baḍagalu . nāraṇahāḷa ragaḍiṁ mūḍalu harivatōḍiṁ teṁkalu . yi gaḍi
yoḷage mu ¢3 gadde . manepadākaḍi . guṁḍi paḍuvalu . naḍevavōṇiṁ baḍagalu . vōḍiniṁmūḍalu . māṇidēvara gaḍiṁteṁkalu .
yī gaḍiyoḷage bha . 7 Ubhayaṁ voṁdumuḍi gadegēṇi Aṁṇamma naḍava Akki mu 3 kkaṁ ḷimādhavamayya kē
śavamayyanahuṭu . naṁma kaṭuguttigeya bayaloḷage Ā bāḷagaḍi . guttige paḍuvalu . heddāri kaṭṭina gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu . kruṣṇa
sāsirasa gaḍiṁ mūḍalu . karttaragaḍiṁ teṁkalu . yī gaḍiṁdoḷage mu 2 . gadde gaḍi maṇigāra kēri halara gaḍiṁ . paḍuva
naḍava vōṇiṁbaḍaga . saṁkaliṁgaseṭṭi gaḍiṁmūḍa . taṁḍradahalara gaḍiṁ teṁkayī gaḍiyoḷage mu[ṁ .] gadde māṇi dēvarigaḍiṁ naḍuva .
na gaḍiṁ baḍaga . karttara gaḍiṁmūḍa . calla beṭiṁteṁka . yī gaḍi yoḷage mu 50 gade ṭhāu saha mu 1 gadde gēṇi te
ṟukaḷadu Akkimu 5 mattaṁ naṁmma huṭu . bārigāuḍana gēṇi . muṁḍunāraṇa kāraṁtanagaḍiṁ paḍuva . kēśa na gaḍiṁ baḍaga . ka
rttara gaḍiṁ mūḍa . kāludārivōṇiṁteṁka . yī gaḍiṁdoḷage bāḷisaha mu 1 gadde . mattaṁ bārigāuḍana gaḍiṁ paḍuva . nāuḍana gaḍiṁ
baḍaga muṁḍanāuḍana gaḍiṁ mūḍa . nāuḍanagaḍiṁ teṁka . yī gaḍiṁdoḷage mu . 0 gadde Ubhayaṁ na gaddasahamu 1 . gaddege te
ṟu taḷadaru Akkimu 8 kuṁbhāsiya tāmaṇivadu manehattu huṭṭu naṁmakaṭṭutikaṭṭiyali gaḍi Aṁṇa viṣṇugaḍiyaṁ pa
ḍuva . hattāra gaḍiṁ mūḍa . yī gaḍiyiṁdoḷage mu 4 gade . mattaṁ naḍubayaloḷage hattārada Aṁṇagōṭana gaḍiṁpaḍuva hattā
rara gaḍiṁ mūḍa . �yo gaḍiyiṁdoḷage mu 2 . gade Alliṁ paḍuva . Aṁṇa hattārara gaḍiṁ mūḍa . gaddemu 7 Aṁkapagauḍanagaḍi
ṁpaḍuva . hattārara gaḍiṁ mūḍa gaddemu . 2 Aṁkahebārara gaḍiṁ paḍuva . mane Aḍi . Aṁṇaviṣṇuga
ḍiṁ baḍaga �yo gaḍiṁdoḷage haḍi . mane . maraphala saha Aṁti 175 terrukaḷadu Akkimu 15 kerebayalli cōḷikēri
halara gaḍiṁ paḍuva . Aṁṇaviṣṇu gaḍiṁmūḍa . yi gaḍiṁdoḷage ma 1 . gaddege varaga 25 gēṇi Akkimu 3 Ubhayaṁ Akki mu 1
bijāḍiyalli . naṁma huṭu . Arasaragēṇi . Ā bāḷagaḍi . sēnādi śaṁkaraliṁgana gaḍiṁ paḍuva kāludārivōṇiṁ baḍaga . jā
Arasara gaḍiṁ mūḍa . sēnādi śaṁkaraliṁgana gaḍi . Arasara gaḍiṁ teṁka �yo gaḍiṁdoḷage mane Adisaha gaddemu 10 ge beḷa
nīrugadde muṭṭasarina baccalu . voḷahādiyalli koṭīśvaradēvara devasa . cātramara . 3 . maṇigāra kērihalara gaḍiṁpaḍuva . ma
ṇigāra kēri halara gaḍiṁ baḍaga . gaṇabādana gaḍiṁ mūḍa . maṇigārakēri halara gaḍiṁteṁka . �yo gaḍiṁdoḷage beṭṭuhakalu ke
ṟisaha gadde mu 2 ma 20 kōṭīśvara dēvara gaḍiṁ paḍuva . ru śivālyada nīru hariva baccalaṁ baḍaga kēśava bhaṭaru . malegaḍiṁ
mūḍa . vōṇiyiṁtteṁka . yā gaḍiṁdoḷage mu 4 gade mu 16 ke gēṇi Akkimu 45 ge naḍaudu . tirumaṇi seṭṭi
ge Akkimu 2 gaṇadaseṭṭi saṁtānadarige mu 1 . Aṁṇukoṁgarige mu 1 . kōṭēśvara dēvarige mu . Þ naṁdādīvigege ge Akki mu 2 .
Āṁ hoṟage naḍa mu 1089 mu 24 . 2 gōviṁda teguḷana baḻanaya huṭṭu Ārāḷagaḍiṁ tiṁmyana gaḍiṁ paḍuva . karta
ra kōṭīśvara dēvara gaḍiṁ baḍaga . kēśavabhaṭṭara kōṭīśvara dēvara gaḍiṁ mūḍa . niruśivālyada nīru hariva baccaliṁ teṁka . yī gaḍiṁdoḷa
ge gade ma 5 ke gēṇi Akkimu 1¢ ke gaṇapa seṭi naḍaudu mu 3 ... 2 kōṭīśvara dēvarige mu 1 Ubhayaṁ 3 ... da mu 11
ḍiyalli hoṁnu bālemāliṁgaseṭṭiya huṭṭu naṁmakaṭṭu . Ā bāḷagaḍi . korage toḷahara baḷiyora gaḍiṁ paḍuva . Ūra
polana gaḍiṁbaḍaga kāludāriṁ mūḍa . Adā baḷiyora liṁteṁka . yī gaḍiṁdoḷage mu 3 gadde makkimaneṭhāu saha gaddemu 8
mattaṁ duggana gadde . Adābaḷiyora cikkutōṭadiṁ paḍuva baracuseṭi gaḍiṁ baḍaga caṁcuseṭṭi kaṁbaḷagaddeyiṁ mūḍa . harivaba
caliṁteṁka . yī gaḍiṁdoḷage gaddemu 4 guḷi koṁḍara gaddegaḍi . harivahāḷiyiṁ paḍuva . Adābaḷiyoragaḍiṁ baḍaga . Adā
baḷiyora beṭṭu huyigeyiṁmūḍa . bāḷakuṁṭe tōṭaṁ teṁka . yī gaḍiyiṁdoḷage gadde mu 4 gaddemu 16 kke gēṇi
Akkimu 24 kke taṟige mu 6 suḷidu mu 1Þ vokuḷādiyalina huṭṭunaṁmma kaṭṭu harivahoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuva .
toḷahara baḷiyanara gaḍiṁmūḍa . yī gaḍiṁdoḷage gaddemu 2 . dēvaragere bayala toḷahara baḷiyora gaḍi paḍuva . māci
ṭi baḷiyora gaḍiṁmūḍa . yī gaḍiṁdoḷage . gaddemu . 0 Ubhayaṁ mu 3 gadde gēṇi Akkimu 12 kkelaccidēvara dēvasva Akki mu 4
Akkimu 8 maṇūrali hāḍi koṭṭa seṭṭi hulugaṁci sūriseṭṭi mākaṇakoṭu nagaḍiṁ paḍuva
habbucumayyana gaḍiṁbaḍaga . habbucamayyanagaḍiṁ mūḍa . guju yī gaḍiṁ doḷage gadde 2 ka mu 1 ...
gaḍiṁ baḍaga . baḷitoḷahara baḷiyora gaḍiṁ mūḍa . teṁka . yī gaḍiṁdoḷage
gēṇi mu 16 kkaṁ kōṭīśvara dēvara mu 1 nīru The continuxtion is built
Digital edition of SII 27.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
